name: No documentation of work accident in West Valley City, still eligible?
description: Yes, use testimony/medical; report creates record.[3]

mainEntity.name: No documentation of work accident in West Valley City, still eligible?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, use testimony/medical; report creates record.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, if witnesses, medical history, consistent story prove it; Utah accepts circumstantial evidence. Supervisor knowledge helps.[3] Key factors: prompt report, treatment notes mentioning work. Reconstruct via affidavits, video; build case. Many succeed without paper trail.
